rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings and assignments.
Use `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax to encapsulate AGREE contracts within AADL components.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture scope when inserting annex blocks; ensure bindings and assignments align with component implementation structure.
When inserting AGREE contracts, validate that all referenced identifiers are visible in the target scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` and placed within AADL component implementations or types as appropriate.
anti_patterns: Avoid inserting AGREE annex blocks into component types when the content is implementation-specific or requires binding to deployment elements.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE contract validation and repair patterns
AADL structural extraction for component types and features
